title: Standalone app scaffold
description: Next.js app (port 3017, basePath /risk-library), vendored @platform packages, Dockerfile, docker-compose.app.yml, build.sh. Mirror pss-production-card.
close_reason: Scaffold built + pushed (cb73732); next build passes.

title: embedding-proxy service (Proxmox)
description: POST /embed {texts,role} -> vectors; applies nomic search_query:/search_document: prefix + L2 normalise; forwards to Orin Ollama nomic-embed-text. Internal-only on platform_net.
notes:
Code written + py_compile passes. Runtime test blocked on Ollama + nomic-embed-text on the Orin (10.0.0.74:11434). Lives in repo at embedding-proxy/.
PoC embeddings: Ollama + nomic-embed-text on the dev machine's RTX 4070 (not the Orin yet). embedding-proxy runs natively via Python venv (Docker not needed). Orin inherits EMBEDDING_ORIN_URL later.

title: Apply migration 040 to shared Supabase
description: Apply platform-portal/supabase/migrations/040_risk_library.sql to self-hosted Supabase (10.0.0.85). 'create extension vector' may need supabase_admin. Verify HNSW index + match_risk_library RPC. Checkpoint with Steve before applying.
notes: Migration 040 written to platform-portal/supabase/migrations/040_risk_library.sql. Awaiting on-LAN apply (sandbox can't reach 10.0.0.85 on any port). Apply via Studio SQL editor or ssh+supabase_admin.
close_reason: Applied + verified on self-hosted 10.0.0.85 (2026-07-02): pgvector 0.8.0, rl_risk/rl_issue/rl_action/rl_vector, rl_match RPC, rl_vector_hnsw. Applied over :5432 as postgres.

title: Risk Library PoC
description: Semantic risk library: capture project Risks/Actions/Issues; surface similar past ones during a new project's risk assessment. Spec: docs/DESIGN.md, CONTEXT.md, docs/adr/0001-0003.
notes: Phase-2 LLM relevance triage brought forward and WORKING (qwen2.5:7b via Ollama on the dev 4070). /api/risk/triage + auto-triage in Assess. Correctly keeps paint~coating, drops coating~coding false-positive that cosine ranked higher. This was the deferred phase-2 synthesis step.

title: Assessment lookup UI + /api/risk/search
description: Project-profile query -> embedding-proxy (role=query) -> match_risk_library RPC -> ranked, kind-grouped results (Risks to consider / Issues that hit related jobs).
notes: Assessment UI + /api/risk/search written; next build passes (05bb7ef). Runtime pending DB migrate + embedding-proxy/Orin.

title: Capture + seeding UI + /api/risk/capture
description: Cause/event/effect capture form + fast seeding mode; capture API embeds on save via embedding-proxy. Open RLS, attributed by created_by.
notes: Capture + Seed UI + /api/risk/capture written; next build passes (05bb7ef). Runtime pending DB migrate + embedding-proxy/Orin.

title: Portal projects card -> /risk-library/
description: Add a card in platform-portal projects area linking to /risk-library/, same pattern as other standalone apps.
notes: Risk Library card added to apps/portal/app/page.tsx (uncommitted in platform-portal). To be reachable also needs: nginx /risk-library/ route in production.conf + portal rebuild + app deploy.

value: Migration 040 (rl_risk/rl_issue/rl_action/rl_vector + rl_match RPC + pgvector 0.8.0 HNSW) APPLIED to self-hosted Supabase 10.0.0.85 on 2026-07-02. Applied over :5432 as postgres (pooler user postgres.your-tenant-id) with psql -f; postgres role CAN create extension vector (no supabase_admin needed). Verified: extension, 4 tables, rl_match(7 args), rl_vector_hnsw index all present. NOT yet applied to cloud prod.

Supabase self-hosted VM = Proxmox VMID 200 'pss-supabase-host' on node pve. Its netplan /etc/netplan/01-static.yaml statically assigns 10.0.0.85/24 (gw 10.0.0.2, DNS 10.0.0.105+1.1.1.1) but to interface 'eth0' — the NIC actually enumerates as 'ens18', so after a reboot it comes up with NO LAN IP (only docker bridges) and nothing on 10.0.0.85 responds. Fix: point the config at ens18 (long-term: match by MAC bc:24:11:11:56:12). Drive the VM headless via Proxmox host shell: qm guest exec 200 -- <cmd>.
